MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMAN B. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-23-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JAN-03-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JAN-03-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEHR, PAUL LEON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 411 O'FARRELL ST, #515, S.F, CA. $600.14 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $600.14, STAYED UNTIL JAN-11-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE INMMEDIATLEY,BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 1-11-94 5PM. MUTUAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS. PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. DEF. CERTIFIES THERE ARE NO OTHER OCCUPANT PL. WILL WAIVE ALL RENT & DAMAGES IF DEF. VACATES ON 1-11-94 SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
